name: Boolean Yes/No Radio
summary: Boolean field rendered as Yes/No radio buttons using `format: radio` option
whenToUse: Yes/No questions like 'Are you over 18?' or 'Do you have dependents?'
When you need a clear binary choice presented as radio buttons instead of a checkbox

uiSchema.label: Are you over 18 years of age?

notes: Set `options.format` to `"radio"` to render as radio buttons
Use `textForTrue` and `textForFalse` to customize the labels (defaults to 'Yes'/'No')
The `label` property overrides the auto-generated label from the property name
Boolean radios are ideal for triggering rules that SHOW/HIDE dependent fields
